# Prasad Gade - Full Profile

> Data Scientist and Computer Engineer from Mumbai, India. B.Tech student at Sardar Patel Institute of Technology (CGPA 9.26/10). Builds data pipelines, ML models, dashboards, and interactive web applications. Published researcher and hackathon winner.

## About This Site

prasadgade.dev is Prasad's personal portfolio. It is a single-page React app hosted on GitHub Pages.

This site is not just a resume. It represents who Prasad is as a person. It has technical projects, but also hobbies, favorite movies, a 3D Minecraft skin, a paper physics playground, and hidden easter eggs. The site is built for everyone - recruiters, friends, colleagues, and anyone curious.

Site features:
- 4 visual themes: dark, light, arcade dark, arcade light
- Auto-detects device theme preference
- No-scroll desktop layout (everything fits one screen)
- 3D Minecraft skin viewer (using skinview3d and Three.js)
- Paper playground: the screen turns into a crumpled paper with real physics
- Hidden easter eggs: Konami code and "hesoyam" trigger animations
- "Start Here" modal for non-tech visitors explaining every section
- Resume opens in an in-app modal
- Responsive for mobile, tablet, and desktop-site-on-mobile
- Every modal closes on ESC key
- Custom domain: prasadgade.dev

## Resume Variants

### Primary Slim Resume
- Endpoint: https://prasadgade.dev/api/resume.json
- Purpose: default agent-facing summary resume
- Scope: MAIN_RESUME-aligned skills, primary education/work summary, and the full 11-project public portfolio set

### Master Detailed Resume
- Endpoint: https://prasadgade.dev/api/resume-master.json
- Purpose: detailed agent-facing profile
- Scope: adds diploma education, current TA/research role, publications, leadership, broader certifications, and richer project detail

## Education

### B.Tech in Computer Engineering
- Institution: Bhartiya Vidya Bhavan's Sardar Patel Institute of Technology (SPIT), Mumbai
- Minor: Management from SPJIMR (S. P. Jain Institute of Management & Research)
- CGPA: 9.26/10.0
- Expected graduation: June 2027

### Diploma in Computer Technology
- Institution: K. K. Wagh Polytechnic, Nashik
- Grade: 96.51%
- Duration: August 2021 to June 2024

## Experience

### Undergraduate Research & Teaching Assistant
- Organization: Department of Computer Engineering, SPIT, Mumbai
- Duration: February 2025 to present
- Performed statistical analysis on student performance data and course feedback to generate reports for faculty
- Conducted literature reviews and migrated manuscripts from Word to LaTeX for research publications
- Created academic posters translating technical research into accessible visual formats

### Data Analyst Intern (Summer Internship)
- Organization: R3 Systems India Pvt. Ltd., Nashik
- Duration: June 2023 to July 2023
- Learned Data Analysis and Business Intelligence using Power BI
- Delivered a sales dashboard for North Wind Traders, improving data visibility by 70%

## Projects

The public agent-facing layer intentionally exposes these 11 projects and no more:

### IPL Analytics Platform - Interactive Cricket Data Dashboard
- Engineered a 3-stage data pipeline processing 278,205 ball-by-ball records across 18 IPL seasons (2008-2025)
- Built 14 interactive dashboard pages with 58 preset SQL queries and a custom query builder
- Achieved zero data mismatches across player aggregates, validated with 25 automated tests
- Demo: https://analytics-ipl.streamlit.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/IPL_Analysis

### UPI Analytics Platform - Data Engineering & Analytics Dashboard
- Processed 9,026 JSON files from 3 sources across 788 districts and 42 months
- Quantified market duopoly via HHI, inequality via Gini coefficients, and adoption tiers with K-Means
- Delivered 68 visualizations across Streamlit and Power BI dashboards, validated by 83 tests
- Demo: https://upi-analytics.streamlit.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/UPI_DS_Project

### Lex Simulacra - AI Legal Courtroom Simulator
- Built an 8-agent legal simulation with 99% citation accuracy
- Reduced legal research time by 75% across 100K+ documents
- Improved context relevance by 3.2x with compression and hallucination detection
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/Law_Courtroom_Simulator

### Intrusion Detection - TII-SSRC-23 Analysis
- Benchmarked 6 ML/DL models on an 8.6M-sample dataset
- Achieved 99.99% recall and 100% precision
- Improved throughput and reduced false negatives with tree-based models
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/IDS_on_TII-SSRC-23

### KindHearts - Donation Platform
- 1st place at Tech Horizon National Hackathon
- Reduced donation request processing time by 60%
- Added real-time tracking, transparency, and admin workflows
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/KindHearts-Multi-Role-Donation-Management-Platform

### Celestial Classifier - SDSS Dataset Analysis
- Achieved 99.07% accuracy classifying celestial objects
- Tuned the neural network from 95.13% to 98.78% accuracy
- Benchmarked 4 classifiers with 5-fold CV
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/Celestial-Object-Classifier-using-Solana-Digital-Sky-Survey-Dataset

### NutriSnap - AI Nutrition Tracker
- Uses Gemini API for image and manual meal analysis
- Tracks calorie and macro goals with interactive dashboards
- Supports local SQLite-backed tracking
- Demo: https://prasadsnutritiontracker.netlify.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/nutrition_tracker

### Audio Visualizer - Real-Time Music Visualization Tool
- Real-time audio visualization with multiple dynamic modes
- Fully client-side deployment with file upload and microphone input
- Reached 1000+ unique visitors in the first month
- Demo: https://prasadgade.dev/audio_visualizer_app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/audio_visualizer_app

### Attendance Tracker - Feature-Rich Attendance PWA
- Attendance reports, student analysis, and editable records
- Offline-first IndexedDB storage with import/export support
- Demo: https://prasadgade.dev/attendance/
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/attendance

### Habit Tracker - Client-Side Progressive Web App
- GitHub-style contribution charts, streaks, and analytics
- Privacy-first, offline local storage using IndexedDB
- Demo: https://prasadgade.dev/Habit-Tracker/
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/Habit-Tracker

### Portfolio - Personal Developer Portfolio
- Multi-theme interactive portfolio with agent-readable files
- Includes Minecraft skin viewer, paper playground, and easter eggs
- Demo: https://prasadgade.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/prasad-gade05/prasad-gade05.github.io
